title: The Adventures of Long John Silver
overview:
The Adventures of Long John Silver is a family adventure series about the Long John Silver character from Treasure Island. Produced in 1954 in colour in Australia for the American and British markets before the development of Australian television.

Long John Silver is the proud captain of his own ship and his own crew. He and his buccaneer cruise around the Caribbean and often stay on the side of the English and fight the French and Spanish. After long and dangerous adventures, he and his crew rest in the tavern of Miss Purity.

The series first aired in the United States on syndicated basis in 1956, but irregularly as part of another show. Several episodes were edited together and shown theatrically under the titles: 'Under the Black Flag' and 'South Sea Pirates'.

Afterwards, it was sold to the ITV in the UK, and aired in 1957. In 1958, the Australian Broadcasting Company (ABC) screened the series as part of Children's TV Club.
creator: Robert Louis Stevenson

episodes.title: The Necklace
episodes.overview: Long John Silver is arrested for murder and robbery. Miss Purity and Jim Hawkins try to prove his innocense.

episodes.title: Pieces of Eight
episodes.overview: Desperate to get the money to save his ship, Long John agrees to a plan another pirate recommends to steal Spanish gold. But the pirate turns out to be just as much of a liar as was the last time Long John met him.

episodes.title: Execution Dock
episodes.overview: While sick with a fever, Long John dreams that he is to be executed for piracy.

episodes.title: The Eviction
episodes.overview: The Governor orders to close Miss Purity’s tavern on behalf of the English. Long John discovers plans from the Spanish about an military invasion.

episodes.title: The Pink Pearl
episodes.overview: Gentleman Richard Thorpe asks Lng John for help to find his brother, who is missing on an island occupied by the Spanish. On the island they find out, that the Spanish try everything to get all the pink pearls.

episodes.overview: Long John Silver suddenly is in pain, he has a toothache. So he is forced to save a dentist from the Spanish.

episodes.title: Ship o' the Dead
episodes.overview: Jim Hawkins tells the story that he actually saw a ship in the bay with a dead crew - and of course nobody believes him. Jim and Long John Silver discover that the Spanish robbed the ship and killed the entire crew.

episodes.title: Sword of Vengeance
episodes.overview: Silver and his crew attempt to plunder a Spanish ship, but there's no one aboard except dead prisoners.

episodes.title: Turnabout
episodes.overview: France and England are at war—and to the amusement of Long John Silver and his pirate crew, the foppish French Navy takes over their ship.

episodes.title: Miss Purity's Birthday
episodes.overview: Miss Purity is upset that no one has remembered her birthday except the priest.

episodes.title: Dead Reckoning
episodes.overview: Miss Purity and Long John decide Jim should be sent to a private school after he causes trouble at a local birthday party. But things become worse then Jim's roommate is the same boy who actually caused the trouble at the party.

episodes.title: Devil's Stew
episodes.overview: After losing the Faithful gambling, a former pirate convinces Long John the real money is in honest trade, such as he conducts. But is this "former" pirate really reformed?

episodes.title: Dragon Slayer
episodes.overview: Redbeard says he can bring Long John and Miss Purity back together by making Long John a "Dragon Slayer" like the knights of old. In truth, Redbeard is playing Long John against Miss Purity, and plans on being the winner himself.
